DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TENANT HARASSMENT. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUD/CONCEALMENT AND RELATION FOR PLAINTIFFS TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY (WHO, WHEN, IN WHAT MANNER, TO WHOM) AND FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RETALIATION. Defendant Yook Lee, Dorothy Lee, Jason Lee, Sandra Lee Demurrer To Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Yook Lee, Dorothy Lee, Jason Lee, Sandra Lee's Demurrer To Amended Complaint is
SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to the cause of action for tenant harassment. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for fraud/concealment and relation for Plaintiffs to allege fraud with requisite specificity (who, when, in what manner, to whom) and facts (not conclusions) in support of each element of cause of action for retaliation.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (210/VP)
